forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Snow before 3am, then snow and areas of blowing snow. Cloudy, with a low around 27. Northeast wind 10 to 29 mph, with gusts as high as 48 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 5 to 9 inches possible.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.shortForecast: Heavy Snow And Areas Of Blowing Snow
forecast.detailedForecast: Snow and areas of blowing snow. Cloudy, with a high near 30. North wind 17 to 31 mph, with gusts as high as 54 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 11 to 17 inches possible.

weather_report:
As twilight descends upon Boston, the city braces for a thick embrace of winter, its quiet streets soon to be transformed by a heavy snowfall. Tonight marks the beginning of a storm that promises to blanket the region in soft, white layers; the air carries a chill, hovering around 27 degrees, accentuated by a swirling northeast wind that kicks up gusts formidable enough to dance with the falling flakes. This evening, the familiar sounds of urban life are muffled, as the first whispers of snow settle in, hinting at a night where visibility is reduced, and the only illumination comes from warm, glowing windows amid the growing curtain of snowfall.

The frost won't relent come Monday, as the snowfall continues relentlessly, with predictions of an impressive accumulation that may make even the most stalwart New Englander reminisce about summers gone. The interplay of clouds and wind will render the day's atmosphere a dramatic tableau of grays, suited to reflection or perhaps engaging in indoor pursuits. Layering up is essential; a sturdy coat, warm gloves, and a hat to shield against the biting wind will help you navigate this wintry wonderland. Seek solace indoors, perhaps tucked into a cozy nook with a novel, or savoring the richness of a steaming cup as you gaze out at the world transformed. Inviting friends over for a game night or indulging in the quiet of your thoughts—these mundane yet cherished activities will fit neatly into the snow-draped landscape, where the thrill of the blizzard becomes your own private moment.
